root_cause: All three Business Assessment panels shared one Profile ID input and one validation result state, so validating one panel populated all panels.
repair_summary: Profile validation state was separated into checkoutProfileGate, monthlyProfileGate, and devCodeProfileGate. Each panel now reads and writes only its own gate state.

panel_1_independent_state.validates: completed BOS/Profile ID through existing profile retrieval

panel_2_independent_state.validates: Profile ID plus completed Business Assessment through existing retrieval

panel_3_independent_state.validates: completed BOS/Profile ID through existing profile retrieval

dev_code_profile_binding: Dev Code acceptance and Begin Business Assessment are bound only to devCodeProfileGate.profile.
checkout_profile_binding: Business Assessment checkout uses only checkoutProfileGate.profile.id.
monthly_profile_binding: Monthly Intelligence checkout uses only monthlyProfileGate.profile.id and monthlyProfileGate.businessAssessmentId.
production_smoke_plan: BA5FREE plus Panel 3 validated profile shows Begin Business Assessment
limits: No Stripe price or product changes
No Business Assessment question or generation changes
Manual live retest recommended with known Profile IDs
